title: Ensure favicon reliably appears on AWS deployment
notes: Suggestion #10 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-20). AWS deployment sometimes showed no favicon even though local development did. Initial fixes were attempted (explicit /favicon.ico handling and staticfiles-based resolution), but the issue remains unresolved in AWS and has been shelved temporarily in favour of higher-priority work. Next troubleshooting steps: (1) inspect AWS reverse-proxy/web-server rules for /favicon.ico and static asset caching, (2) verify collectstatic output and served MIME types for .svg/.ico, (3) add a generated .ico asset and serve both .svg and .ico variants, (4) check browser/network traces on AWS for status codes, redirects, cache headers, and CSP/mixed-content constraints. Update suggestion #4 (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-22) reports that the favicon now appears correctly on AWS; closing issue pending any recurrence.
